items.body:
No API design or tooling issues found for `@azure/arm-attestation` v3.0.0-beta.1. The package migrates from the legacy `@azure/core-client` stack to `@azure-rest/core-client`, adds the `PrivateLinkResources` operation group, new model types, and a `KnownVersions` enum. Version `3.0.0-beta.1` is consistent across `package.json`, `CHANGELOG.md`, and `src/api/attestationManagementContext.ts`. No alpha versions are present. No naming violations, no broken `KnownVersions` stable entries, no type-safety issues, and no missing exports were detected.

<details>

</details>
